verses.2: They stoop and they bow down together.
verses.4: Even to old age I am he,
verses.5: “To whom will you compare me, and consider my equal,
verses.6: Some pour out gold from the bag,
verses.7: They bear it on their shoulder.
verses.9: Remember the former things of old;
verses.10: I declare the end from the beginning,
verses.11: I call a ravenous bird from the east,
